tests.name: pact_do(send): submit a PACT request submits a sanity-check request with valid envelope and pushes to remote
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request generates a request ID matching the required format
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request includes sender identity from PACT_USER, not from tool input
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request includes optional deadline field when provided
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request accepts any context_bundle shape without server validation
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request accepts request to any recipient without config validation
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request rejects request when request_type has no matching pact directory
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request rejects request missing required field: recipient
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request rejects request missing required field: request_type
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request preserves explicit thread_id in envelope and return value when provided
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request submits a request with file attachments written to disk and metadata in envelope
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request auto-assigns thread_id = request_id when thread_id not provided
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request omits attachments from envelope when not provided
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request retries push after rebase when remote has new commits
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request returns compose-mode response with pact schema when context_bundle omitted
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request throws pact-not-found when compose mode gets unknown request_type
pact_do(send): submit a PACT request compose-mode response excludes send-only fields (request_id, thread_id, status)
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests returns one pending request addressed to the current user
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests only shows requests addressed to the current user, not others
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests returns requests ordered by creation time, oldest first
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes pact_path so the agent can auto-load the pact file
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes a summary from the context bundle for triage
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes short_id derived from request_id in inbox entries
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes thread_id in inbox entry when the request has one
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests omits thread_id from inbox entry when the request has none
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes attachment_count in inbox entries
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests groups pending requests by thread_id when 2+ share the same thread
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests treats auto-assigned thread_id (thread of one) as standalone
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests handles pre-Phase-2 requests without thread_id gracefully
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes amendment_count in inbox entries
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests includes attachment metadata in inbox entries
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests omits attachments field from inbox entry when envelope has empty attachments array
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests uses 'No summary' when context_bundle has neither question nor issue_summary
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests returns zero results when inbox is empty
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests does not show requests that have been moved to completed
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests falls back to local state with a warning when git pull fails
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests shows requests addressed to a subscribed inbox name
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests does not show subscription-addressed requests to non-subscribers
pact_do(inbox): check inbox for pending requests inbox is a read-only operation -- no commits or pushes
pact_respond: submit a response to a request writes response, moves request to completed, commits and pushes
pact_respond: submit a response to a request response write and request move happen in a single atomic commit
pact_respond: submit a response to a request commit message follows structured format
pact_respond: submit a response to a request responder identity is set from PACT_USER, not tool input
pact_respond: submit a response to a request accepts any response_bundle shape without validation
pact_respond: submit a response to a request preserves thread_id and attachments in request envelope after respond moves it to completed
pact_respond: submit a response to a request sets envelope status to completed when moving request to completed directory
pact_respond: submit a response to a request rejects response when request is already completed
pact_respond: submit a response to a request rejects response when current user is not the designated recipient
pact_respond: submit a response to a request rejects response when request ID does not exist
pact_respond: submit a response to a request rejects response missing required field: response_bundle
pact_respond: submit a response to a request allows a subscriber to respond to a request addressed to a subscribed list
pact_respond: submit a response to a request rejects response from a user not subscribed to the addressed list
pact_respond: submit a response to a request retries push after rebase when remote has new commits

pact_discover: discover available request types and team lists all available pacts with metadata when called with no query
pact_discover: discover available request types and team extracts context and response field names from PACT.md tables
pact_discover: discover available request types and team filters pacts by keyword matching against name and description
pact_discover: discover available request types and team matches when any search term hits (OR semantics, not AND)
pact_discover: discover available request types and team matches search query against the when_to_use section content
pact_discover: discover available request types and team extracts field definitions from YAML frontmatter including optional fields
pact_discover: discover available request types and team extracts fields from YAML frontmatter when pact has no schema.json

pact_discover: discover available request types and team pulls latest from remote before scanning pacts directory
pact_discover: discover available request types and team falls back to local data with warning when git pull fails

Mutation hardening: response-loader.ts check_status on pending request returns status without response (tolerateMissing=default)
Mutation hardening: response-loader.ts check_status on completed single-recipient request returns exact response content
Mutation hardening: response-loader.ts check_status on completed group request with multiple responses returns all response content
Mutation hardening: response-loader.ts check_status on group request where only one person responded returns responses array with length 1
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread for a request with no responses returns empty entries and no response/responses fields
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread with single response returns top-level response (not responses array)
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread with multiple responses returns top-level responses array (not response)
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread with unknown thread_id returns empty entries and descriptive message
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread using request_id alias works the same as thread_id
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread summary includes recipients[] participants
Mutation hardening: pact-thread.ts view_thread with completed request shows completed status in summary
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact with multi_round: false is included with multi_round exactly false
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact with all optional fields present includes them in catalog entry
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact with empty attachments array omits attachments from output
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts inheritance merge where child has response_bundle fields uses child response_bundle
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts dot-prefixed entries in pact-store directory are skipped
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts path traversal entry with .. in directory name is skipped
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts review pact with multiple attachment slots returns all slots
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact with empty when_to_use returns empty array
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact with empty name string is excluded from catalog
Mutation hardening: pact-loader.ts pact without frontmatter delimiters is excluded
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts compressed format uses pipe delimiter, arrow character, and correct field order
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts compressed format with scope filter produces filtered output
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts query filter combined with scope filter returns intersection
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts toEntry maps all extended metadata fields correctly
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts compressed catalog with no scope returns empty string for scope field
Mutation hardening: pact-discover.ts discover results are sorted by name for consistent ordering
Mutation hardening: malformed envelope handling thread scan skips malformed envelopes without crashing
Mutation hardening: malformed envelope handling malformed response envelope in per-respondent directory is still returned (raw)
Mutation hardening: response-loader tolerateMissing branch check_status on completed request with missing response file throws (tolerateMissing=false default)
Mutation hardening: response-loader tolerateMissing branch valid response envelope has typed responder field, malformed response is returned raw
Mutation hardening: response-loader tolerateMissing branch flat response that is malformed (no responder) is returned raw with original fields
Mutation hardening: response-loader tolerateMissing branch empty per-respondent directory returns empty object (no responses key)
Mutation hardening: pact-thread multi-round and sort order multi-round thread (2 entries each with a response) returns responses[] at top level
Mutation hardening: pact-thread multi-round and sort order thread entries with some having no response show correct aggregation
Mutation hardening: pact-thread multi-round and sort order thread sort order: entries are sorted by created_at ascending (earliest first)
Mutation hardening: pact-thread multi-round and sort order cancelled request in thread shows cancelled status
Mutation hardening: pact-loader parseBundleSpec and extractFrontmatter field with no type defaults to 'string'
Mutation hardening: pact-loader parseBundleSpec and extractFrontmatter field with no description defaults to empty string
Mutation hardening: pact-loader parseBundleSpec and extractFrontmatter PACT.md with empty frontmatter (---\n---) returns undefined (excluded from catalog)
Mutation hardening: pact-loader parseBundleSpec and extractFrontmatter content starting with --- but no closing --- returns undefined (excluded)
Mutation hardening: pact-loader parseBundleSpec and extractFrontmatter pact where YAML parses to null (non-object) is excluded from catalog
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child multi_round: true overrides parent multi_round: false
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child without multi_round inherits parent multi_round: true
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child attachments override parent attachments entirely
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child without attachments inherits parent attachments
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child with non-empty when_to_use overrides parent; child with empty inherits parent
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child with empty response_bundle inherits parent response_bundle
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches orphan variant (parent not found) is excluded from catalog
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches deep inheritance (grandchild) is excluded from catalog
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches child description empty inherits parent description
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches defaults shallow-merge: child overrides specific keys, parent provides others
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches when_to_use as a single string becomes a one-element array
Mutation hardening: pact-loader mergeChildOverParent branches context_bundle with no fields or required returns empty spec
